{{CargoOrgan
|name=Dark Matter's Heart
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10841
|idx=46
|description="Dark matter accounts for 85% of the total mass weight and 26.8% of the total mass-energy of the universe."
—BSBN Observation Report
|skill=
|hp=1342
|def=127
|atk=139
|rush=231
|gene1=In explorations, Demon God Cells collected +4%
|gene2=In explorations, Mutant Cells gained +4%
|gene3=Gaia Cabin Output +5%
|gene4={race} HP +80 per Cell Furnace level-up
Cell Furnace LVL upgraded: 20/20
|gene7=Gaia Cabin Output +10% (Awakened)
|}}
